member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel
member.summary: Security level for KAZ-SIGN operations

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level128
member.summary: 128-bit security (SHA-256)

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level192
member.summary: 192-bit security (SHA-384)

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level256
member.summary: 256-bit security (SHA-512)

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError
member.summary: Error codes returned by KAZ-SIGN operations

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.Success
member.summary: Operation successful

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.MemoryError
member.summary: Memory allocation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.RngError
member.summary: Random number generation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.InvalidParameter
member.summary: Invalid parameter

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.VerificationFailed
member.summary: Signature verification failed

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters
member.summary: Parameters for each security level

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetSecretKeyBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get secret key size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetPublicKeyBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get public key size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetSignatureOverhead(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get signature overhead in bytes for the given security level

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetHashBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get hash output size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods
member.summary: Native P/Invoke declarations for KAZ-SIGN library

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.InitLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialize the library for a specific security level. Can be called multiple times with different levels.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.ClearLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clear resources for a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear resources for all security levels.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.KeyPairEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Generate a key pair for a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.SignEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sign a message with a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.VerifyEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a signature with a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.HashEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Hash a message with the hash function for a specific security level.

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a KAZ-SIGN operation fails

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignException.ErrorCode
member.summary: The error code returned by the native library

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN digital signature operations with runtime security level selection.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.#ctor(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new KazSigner with the specified security level.
member.param: If true, automatically initialize for this level

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Level
member.summary: The security level being used

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.SecretKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of secret key in bytes

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PublicKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of public key in bytes

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.SignatureOverhead
member.summary: Signature overhead in bytes (excluding message)

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.HashBytes
member.summary: Hash output size in bytes

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the library for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.IsInitialized
member.summary: Check if the library is initialized for this level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GenerateKeyPair(System.Byte[]@,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Generate a new key pair.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Sign(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sign a message.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Verify a signature and extract the message.
member.returns: True if signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Hash(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Hash a message using the appropriate hash function for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GetVersion
member.summary: Get the library version string.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GetVersionNumber
member.summary: Get the library version number.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Dispose
member.summary: Clear resources for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear all security level resources. Call when completely done with KAZ-SIGN.
